query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_platforms,
  SUM(CASE WHEN jurisdiction IS NOT NULL AND jurisdiction != '[]' AND jurisdiction != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_jurisdiction,
  SUM(CASE WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"cn"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cn_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as us_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"eu"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as eu_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"other"%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_count
FROM platforms;
